name: Pineapple Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a mixing bowl, beat together butter, eggs, and brown sugar until well combined.
3. Gradually stir in flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and nuts into the egg mixture.
4. Add pineapple and remaining flour mixture; mix until just combined.
5. Pour batter into a greased 8x4x2-inch loaf pan (8x4 inch).
6. Sprinkle sugar and cinnamon evenly over the top of the bread.
7. Bake in preheated oven for 50-55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
